preamble.title: Preamble
preamble.p1: The Les Terres du Lion platform places the utmost importance on protecting your personal data. This privacy policy aims to inform you about how we collect, use, store and protect your information when you use our website and services.
preamble.p2: By accessing our platform or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read this policy and consent to the processing of your data under the conditions described below, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller is the association Les Terres du Lion, organizer of the medieval festival of the same name. For any questions regarding your data, you can contact us via our

dataCollected.title: 2. Data Collected
dataCollected.intro: We collect the following data as part of using our platform:
direct: Name, surname and username during registration
Password (stored in hashed form, never in plain text)
auto: Geolocation data (only with your consent for the interactive map)
payment: Transactions are handled by Stripe. We never store your bank details on our servers.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
list: Create and manage your user account
Provide access to platform features (shop, events, quests, quizzes, messaging)
Process your orders and reservations
Manage the gamification system (XP, levels, ranking)
Improve our services and user experience
Ensure platform security and prevent fraud
Send you account-related communications (password reset, confirmations)

retention.title: 4. Data Retention
retention.text: Your personal data is retained for the duration of your registration on the platform. If you delete your account, your data will be erased within 30 days, except for data we are required to retain for legal reasons (invoices, transactions).

sharing.title: 5. Data Sharing
sharing.intro: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. Your data may only be shared with:
list: Stripe for secure payment processing
Google and Discord if you choose to log in via OAuth
Festival service providers for managing your reservations and orders at their locations
Competent authorities in case of legal obligation

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.intro: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data:
list: Password encryption with bcrypt (12 salt rounds)
JWT token authentication with expiration
Brute force attack protection (rate limiting)
HTTP security headers via Helmet.js
Parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
Configured CORS and restricted allowed origins

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.accessDesc: Obtain a copy of your personal data
rights.erasureDesc: Request the deletion of your data
rights.portabilityDesc: Retrieve your data in a structured format
rights.oppositionDesc: Object to the processing of your data
rights.outro: To exercise these rights, contact us via our Contact page. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the relevant data protection authority.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.text: Our platform uses only strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the service (authentication, session). We do not use advertising cookies or third-party trackers for marketing purposes.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. In the event of a substantial change, you will be notified via the platform. We encourage you to review this page regularly.

art1.title: Article 1 — Purpose
art1.p1: These General Terms of Use (hereinafter "ToU") define the terms and conditions under which users access and use the Les Terres du Lion platform, accessible at livrable.constantsuchet.fr.
art1.p2: Any registration or use of the platform implies unreserved acceptance of these ToU. If you do not accept these conditions, please do not use our services.

art2.title: Article 2 — Description of Services
art2.intro: The Les Terres du Lion platform offers the following services:
list: Interactive map — Discover locations, shops and festival activities
Online shop — Purchase products offered by festival service providers
Events — Browse and book activities and events
Quests and gamification — Progression system with XP, levels and ranking
Quizzes — Themed quizzes related to the medieval universe
Messaging — Communication between platform users
Virtual currency (Gold) — Premium currency purchasable to unlock features

art3.title: Article 3 — Registration and Account
art3.intro: Access to certain features requires creating a user account. When registering, you agree to:
list: Provide accurate and up-to-date information
Maintain the confidentiality of your login credentials
Not create multiple accounts for the same person
Immediately inform us of any unauthorized use of your account
art3.oauth: Registration is also possible via third-party services Google and Discord (OAuth). By using these methods, you also accept the terms of these services.

art4.title: Article 4 — Roles and Responsibilities
art4.intro: The platform distinguishes three user roles, each with specific rights and responsibilities:
art4.clientDesc: Can browse the platform, view the map, participate in quizzes, purchase products, book events and progress through quests. Must follow the rules of conduct.
art4.prestataireDesc: Manages their locations, products, events and orders. Commits to providing accurate information about their products and services, and to fulfilling orders and reservations made via the platform.
art4.adminDesc: Manages the overall platform, moderates content and manages users. Reserves the right to suspend or delete any account in case of non-compliance with these ToU.

art5.title: Article 5 — Purchases and Payments
art5.intro: Purchases made on the platform (shop products, Gold) are processed via the secure payment provider Stripe. By making a purchase, you accept the following conditions:
list: Prices displayed are in euros, all taxes included
Payment is due at the time of order
An order summary is provided before validation
The virtual currency "Gold" is non-refundable and cannot be exchanged for real money
art5.retraction: Right of withdrawal: In accordance with Article L221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal does not apply to digital content provided immediately. For physical products, you have a 14-day withdrawal period from receipt.

art6.title: Article 6 — Rules of Conduct
art6.intro: By using the platform, you agree not to:
list: Publish illegal, defamatory, hateful content or content infringing on the rights of others
Attempt to access platform systems or data without authorization
Use robots, scrapers or any automated means to access the service
Impersonate another user
Disrupt the operation of the platform or the festival
Exploit security vulnerabilities without informing administrators
art6.outro: Any breach of these rules may result in the suspension or deletion of your account, without notice or compensation.

art7.title: Article 7 — Intellectual Property
art7.p1: All elements of the platform (design, logos, texts, images, source code, features) are protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction, distribution or use is strictly prohibited.
art7.p2: Content published by users (messages, quiz answers) remains their property. By publishing, you grant Les Terres du Lion a non-exclusive license to use it within the scope of platform operation.

art8.title: Article 8 — Limitation of Liability
art8.intro: The platform is provided "as is". We strive to ensure service availability and security, but cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability. We cannot be held responsible for:
list: Temporary interruptions for maintenance or updates
Data loss resulting from circumstances beyond our control
Content published by users or service providers
Use of your credentials by third parties in case of negligence on your part

art9.title: Article 9 — Account Deletion
art9.text: You may request the deletion of your account at any time from your profile or by contacting us. Deletion results in the erasure of your personal data within 30 days, in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Your progress (XP, levels, ranking) will be permanently lost.

art10.title: Article 10 — Changes to ToU
art10.text: We reserve the right to modify these ToU at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on the platform. By continuing to use the service after modification, you accept the new conditions.

art11.title: Article 11 — Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
art11.text: These ToU are governed by French law. In case of dispute, the parties agree to seek an amicable solution before any legal action. Failing that, the competent courts shall be those of the jurisdiction of the Les Terres du Lion association's headquarters.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: A question, a suggestion or need assistance? The gates of the Kingdom are open to you.
contact.name: Full name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully. We will respond as soon as possible.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
contact.faq1a: Go to your profile and click on "Delete my account", or contact us directly.
contact.faq2q: How to become a service provider?
contact.faq2a: Contact us via the form by selecting "Become a service provider" and we will review your application.
contact.faq3a: No, Gold virtual currency is not refundable once purchased.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.subtitle: In accordance with French law n°2004-575 of June 21, 2004 (LCEN)

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.p1: All content on the Les Terres du Lion website (texts, images, graphics, logo, icons, sounds, software, etc.) is protected by copyright and intellectual property law, in France and worldwide.
ip.p2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation of all or part of the site elements, by any means or process, is prohibited without prior written authorization from the Les Terres du Lion association.

data.title: 4. Personal Data
data.p1: Information regarding the processing of your personal data is detailed in our Privacy Policy.
data.p2: In accordance with the GDPR, you have rights over your personal data.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.text: The site only uses strictly necessary technical cookies for the operation of the service (authentication, user session). No advertising or tracking cookies are used.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: The Les Terres du Lion association strives to provide information as accurate as possible on the site. However, it cannot be held responsible for omissions, inaccuracies or shortcomings in updates.
liability.p2: The association cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damage caused to the user's equipment when accessing the site.

links.title: 7. Hyperlinks
links.text: The site may contain hyperlinks to other sites (Stripe, Google, Discord). The Les Terres du Lion association has no control over the content of these third-party sites and disclaims any responsibility for their content.

law.title: 8. Applicable Law
law.text: These legal notices are governed by French law. In case of dispute, and after an attempt at amicable resolution, jurisdiction is attributed to the competent French courts.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Discover the history, vision and team behind Les Terres du Lion.
about.historyP1: Les Terres du Lion was born from a shared passion for medieval history and the desire to revive this fascinating era through an immersive and interactive festival.
about.historyP2: More than just an event, Les Terres du Lion is a complete experience: a medieval village where artisans, performers and enthusiasts come together to offer visitors a journey through time.
about.historyP3: This digital platform was designed to extend the experience beyond the festival: discover locations on the interactive map, book your activities, take on quests and climb the kingdom's rankings.
about.mission1Desc: Recreate the atmosphere of an authentic medieval village with its shops, artisans and entertainment to transport every visitor to another era.
about.mission2Desc: Create a meeting place for artisans, history enthusiasts and families, where everyone can share, learn and have fun together.
about.mission3Desc: Make the visit interactive through quests, quizzes, rankings and rewards. Every visitor becomes an adventurer of the kingdom.
about.teamDesc: Four builders joined forces to bring the Kingdom to life. From crafting the interactive map to forging the quest system, every stone of this digital fortress bears their mark.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to fully enjoy the Kingdom.
faq.notFoundDesc: Our team is here to help.

items.q: What is Les Terres du Lion?
items.a: Les Terres du Lion is an immersive medieval festival with an interactive digital platform. Explore the map, attend events, complete quests and discover the village shops.

items.q: Is access to the site free?
items.a: Yes, registration and access to the platform are completely free. Only shop purchases and Gold purchases are paid.

items.q: Is the site available in multiple languages?
items.a: Yes, the platform is available in 5 languages: French, English, Spanish, German and Monegasque.

items.q: How do I create an account?
items.a: Go to the Registration page and fill out the form. You can also sign up via Google or Discord.

items.q: I forgot my password, what should I do?
items.a: Click on "Forgot password" on the login page. A reset link (valid for 1 hour) will be sent to your email.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
items.a: Go to your profile and click "Delete my account". Your data will be erased within 30 days. Your progress will be permanently lost.

items.q: Can I link my Google or Discord account?
items.a: Yes, from your profile. A confirmation email will be sent to secure the link.
Add items to your cart, proceed to checkout and pay by credit card via Stripe (secure payment).
Gold is the Kingdom's virtual currency. You can buy it with real money via Stripe and use it to unlock premium features.
No, Gold is non-refundable and cannot be exchanged for real money, as per our Terms of Service.
Absolutely. Payments are processed by Stripe. We never store your banking details on our servers.

items.q: How do I book an activity?
items.a: Go to the Events page or the interactive map, select your activity and click "Book". An account is required.
Yes, go to "My Reservations" in your personal area to manage and cancel your bookings.
Yes, some activities have limited spots. We recommend booking in advance.
Quests are challenges to complete during the festival. Complete them to earn XP, level up and climb the rankings.
XP (experience points) allows you to level up. The higher your level, the higher you rank in the Kingdom's leaderboard.
No, quizzes are optional. They offer a fun way to test your knowledge and earn extra points.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.subtitle: The Kingdom welcomes every adventurer. Our commitment to an accessible festival and platform for all.
accessibility.commitP1: The Les Terres du Lion association is committed to making its festival and digital platform accessible to everyone, in accordance with WCAG 2.1 guidelines.
accessibility.commitP2: Accessibility is an ongoing process. We are actively working to improve the experience for every user, regardless of their abilities.
accessibility.mobilityDesc: The main paths of the village are designed to be wheelchair accessible. Key locations have access ramps.
accessibility.sanitaryDesc: Accessible restrooms for people with reduced mobility are installed at several strategic points in the village.
accessibility.waterDesc: Accessible drinking water fountains are distributed throughout the village for the comfort of all visitors.
accessibility.supportDesc: Our volunteer team is trained to welcome and assist people with disabilities throughout their visit.
accessibility.keyboardDesc: The entire site is navigable by keyboard. All interactive elements are reachable via the Tab key.
accessibility.contrastDesc: Colors and font sizes have been chosen to ensure sufficient contrast and good readability.
accessibility.responsiveDesc: The platform adapts to all screens: desktop, tablet and mobile.
accessibility.altTextDesc: Images have alternative texts to be interpreted by screen readers.
accessibility.multilingualDesc: The site is available in 5 languages to welcome an international audience.
accessibility.reportDesc: If you encounter an accessibility difficulty on our site or at the festival, we invite you to report it. Your feedback helps us improve the experience for everyone.

notFound.title: Unknown Land
notFound.description: You have ventured beyond the borders of the Kingdom. This page does not exist or has been moved.
notFound.quote: "Every lost traveler eventually finds their way."
